title: Questions about the sandbox
wikitext: []: Questions about the sandbox.             Quote Post by D310S » Wed Apr 17, 2019 11:38 pm I just noticed there's a frame of a sandbox in EP 18 when Asuka and Hikari are talking about Toji. There's no way this isn't connected to the two girls in Shinji's sandbox sequence. I believe there's more to this than Shinji's feelings of isolation from his peers but I haven't found any links yet. Any thoughts on the subject?
